news.title: Commerce ministry to launch PPI and a revamped WPI series on June 15
news.india_relevance: India is overhauling its primary wholesale inflation gauge and introducing a new Producer Price Index.
news.why_it_matters: This is a major statistical reform that will change how inflation is measured, with broad implications for monetary policy, business contracts, and economic analysis.

news.title: Retail loan stress is the new growth driver for ARCs
news.india_relevance: Asset reconstruction companies in India are seeing a new business opportunity in stressed retail loans.
news.why_it_matters: This signals a shift in the nature of credit stress in India's financial system from corporate to retail, altering the business models of ARCs.

news.title: War shifts 80% of India's diesel exports to Africa
news.india_relevance: Geopolitical conflict has redirected India's diesel export flows from traditional markets to Africa.
news.why_it_matters: Highlights how global disruptions reshape India's trade patterns and refinery economics, creating new dependencies and opportunities.

news.title: India-UK FTA implementation stuck due to carbon tax on steel; Scotch duties may be rolled back to rebalance pact

news.title: MSMEs to bear bigger hit than large firms from West Asia conflict: Crisil
